ops.title: Pass G: sequential diff-encoding pass (seq_diff.rs)
ops.description: similar crate (v2, default-features off, text; NO deadline API — determinism). Same-tool nearest-earlier pairing via tool_use_id → ToolUse.name; diff the THREADED forms; G_MIN_CHARS=1024 both sides, G_MAX_BYTES=512KiB, diff ≤ 0.5× target. Unified-diff render with base tool_use_id header. Tighten extract_refs to exact placeholder syntax (regression: content mentioning ref=… doesn't enter GC reachability). HeadTailPass skip-guard for seq_diff proposals. Chain final: F→D→E→I→A→B→C→G→J. Plan: two-notes-shimmying-zephyr Phase 1.

ops.text: seq_diff_* unit tests + prop_seq_diff roundtrip (base + diff ops reconstruct target; needs_ref = pre-diff content) green
